message:
cli,web,shared: Client-generated transcript IDs

Generate stable CUID2 IDs on the CLI so commit links match share links
directly without redirect.

- Add SQLite-backed local store for ID persistence
- Generate client IDs before upload, cache server responses
- Use client ID in commit link instead of sessionId
- Server validates ID ownership and transcriptId matching
- Dual lookup in /s/ route (id first, then transcriptId fallback)
- Add E2E tests for idempotency and ID recovery

_just works_: nice!

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/df69rx3wij
